arguments.reason: the applicant moved outside the district

stages.purpose: After the cancellation function becomes available, cancel the supplied stable ID exactly once.

state_assertions: Before the follow-up, pub-119 remains active.
After the cancellation call, pub-119 is cancelled and the distractor records are unchanged.
response_constraints: On the initial turn, explain that the available functions cannot cancel a record; do not call a lookup or claim success.
When the cancellation function is introduced, call it once with the supplied ID and exact reason, then report only the simulated result.

follow_up_turns.content: The simulator now exposes public-services_cancel. Continue the original request without calling the lookup functions.

prompt: Cancel Residential parking permit, record ID pub-119, because the applicant moved outside the district. Use that exact reason and do not touch similarly named records.

public-services_cancel.reason: the applicant moved outside the district
